SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2013 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROBERT J. STUMPF JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (525)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT APPELLANT CHHIPWADIA, SURESH DBA JONES HOTEL CHHIPWADIA, BHANUBEN S TAKE NOTHING FROM RESPONDENT PATEL, VIMLABEN JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF SURESH CHHIPWADIA ET AL. AND AGAINST VIMLABEN PATEL. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF JUNE 11, 2013. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, VIMLABEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHHIPWADIA, SURESH DBA JONES HOTEL CHHIPWADIA, BHANUBEN S $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JULY 12, 2013 RETURN ALL PLAINTIFF'S ITEMS IN DEFENDANT'S POSSESSION TO PLAINTIFF, INCLUDING PLAINTIFF'S COMPUTER TV, CLOTHING, RESTAURANT EQUIPMENT AND MERCHANDISE AND HOUSEHOLD GOODS. SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-22-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Cause on Calendar for Small Claims Appeal
Judge Pro Tem: Robert J. Stumpf Jr., Clerk: Mars Goodman, Proceedings not reported. (525)

9:10 am
Daniel Piccinini, Esq., appearing on behalf of Appellants. Appellants Suresh Chhipwadia dba Jones Hotel and Bhanuben Chhipwadia are present in Court.
Respondent Vimlaben Patel, appearing on her own behalf.
Both parties are sworn and examined.
Witness Manjula Patel is sworn and testifies on behalf of the Appellants.

Appellant's Exhibits 1 - 20 pages of documents: lease agreement,signed lists,wire transfer (2),revocation of general power of attorney,email, letter,stipulation of discontinuance. (placed in envelope)

Respondent's Exhibits A - 6 pages of documents: letter, list, photos of jewelry, sarees, prayer set.(placed in envelope)

10:20am
Apellant's and Respondent's exhibits are retained
Matter is submitted.
Court is adjourned.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-01-2013 Continued To Aug-22-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
